---
title: "90 Optional Segmentation MLflow Appendix"
format: html
execute:
  eval: false
---

## Purpose

The original PyTorch/Pascal VOC workflow remains as an optional appendix for teaching learned perception, segmentation preview artifacts, and model logging.

## Setup

```bash
uv sync --dev --group segmentation
```

## Commands

```bash
uv run --group segmentation python train.py --config params.yaml --synthetic --model tiny --no-mlflow
uv run --group segmentation python train.py --config params.yaml --synthetic --model tiny --max-samples 4 --max-batches 1 --log-model
```

## Boundary

PyTorch is not required for the main visual-localization course. It is introduced only when the teaching goal moves from classical/geometric CV systems into deep-learning model workflows.
